notes: Security hardening release. Weak passwords (like a word plus a year) are now rejected, with a clearer strength meter that estimates how hard your password is to crack.
New optional Online high-security mode: your own server takes part in unlocking, so a stolen local file cannot be brute-forced offline.
Added a plain-language security explainer and password guidance inside the app, plus guidance for locking down the AI import endpoint.
Stronger key stretching (PBKDF2 1,000,000 rounds) with the derived key cached per session, so saving stays fast.
The AI import endpoint now enforces its allowed origin and supports an optional shared secret. Your data and budgets are unchanged.
